things.name: Medeu Skating Rink & Shymbulak Ski Resort
things.description: World's highest skating rink at 1,691m in a spectacular mountain bowl above the city

things.name: Kok-Tobe Hill
things.description: Cable car to hill with panoramic views over Almaty and the Tian Shan mountains

things.name: Panfilov Park & Ascension Cathedral
things.description: Cathedral Square with Kazakhstan's most beautiful wooden Russian Orthodox church

things.name: Central State Museum of Kazakhstan
things.description: Kazakhstan's national museum with a 5,000-year-old Golden Man Scythian warrior costume

things.name: Green Bazaar (Zelyony Bazar)
things.description: Almaty's most colourful market with Central Asian dried fruits, horse sausage and kumiss

things.name: Big Almaty Lake (Bolshoe Almatinskoe)
things.description: Turquoise glacial lake at 2,511m surrounded by snow-capped peaks

things.name: Charyn Canyon
things.description: Kazakhstan's Grand Canyon - a 150m deep red-rock gorge 200km from Almaty

things.name: Museum of Folk Musical Instruments
things.description: Collection of traditional Kazakh instruments including dombra, kobyz and zhetygen

things.name: Ile-Alatau National Park
things.description: Mountain national park directly behind Almaty with glaciers and alpine meadows

things.name: Arbat (Jibek Joly Street)
things.description: Almaty's pedestrian shopping street with fountains, restaurants and the central mosque
